U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails in Jasmine's inbox and the shared company inbox (info@keystonemortgage.com) for borrower complaints using search_emails (query related to "complaint" or "penalty" or "review" or "denied" or "payment" or similar, across multiple searches). The agent needs to discover at least the following borrower complaint threads: Destiny Pham (destiny.pham@gmail.com) emailing jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com and info@keystonemortgage.com about a prepayment penalty she found in her closed loan documents, says LO Keisha Williams told her there was no penalty and English is not her first language; Khalid Hassan (khalid.hassan82@gmail.com) emailing info@keystonemortgage.com about a prepayment penalty in his closed loan, says he was told no penalty before closing; Danielle Harrison (danielle.harrison@gmail.com) email thread about a ~$400 monthly payment increase post-closing with Derek Moss's reply explaining Mecklenburg County tax reassessment; Joshua Cruz (joshua.cruz@yahoo.com) emailing jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com requesting his loan file be sent to Marcus Webb (who is leaving/left Keystone), referencing loan number LN-2026-00527; Aisha Walker CFPB complaint (consumerresponse@cfpb.gov → denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com) alleging racial discrimination in denial, naming comparator James Goldstein and referencing Keisha Williams being dismissive, plus the Charlotte Observer reporter (alicia.monroe@charlotteobserver.com) emailing info@keystonemortgage.com requesting comment on a viral borrower complaint thread.
OE 2: Search emails for Grace Yamamoto's flagged items and internal coordination using search_emails (query related to "Grace" or "Destiny" or "Google review" or "CFPB" or similar). The agent needs to discover: Grace's email to Keisha, Denise, and Jasmine requesting file timeline on Destiny Pham (email_email_da19541f2ffb); Grace's preliminary findings on the Destiny review shared with Robert, Maya, Denise, and Jasmine; Denise's compliance exposure summary on the Pham prepayment penalty file (no language-preference or interpreter documentation found); Denise's CFPB investigation plan and 15-day response deadline for Aisha Walker; Keith's closed file review confirming signed disclosures include prepayment penalty for both Pham and Hassan files; and internal coordination emails about not responding publicly to Destiny's Google review/social media thread.
OE 3: Search Slack messages for borrower complaint discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query related to "complaint" or "Pham" or "penalty" or "CFPB" or "borrower" or similar). The agent needs to discover Slack discussions providing additional context on the complaint situations, including the prepayment penalty disclosure concerns, the servicing transfer/credit damage issue for Destiny Pham, and the CFPB fair lending investigation for Aisha Walker.
OE 4: Look up Destiny Pham's loan records in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Destiny Pham" or similar), then mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Destiny Pham") to find all associated loans, and mortgage_los_get_loan for each discovered loan. The agent needs to discover 7 loan files: LN-2026-00522 (loan_id: los_loan_6305758350b5, LO: Keisha Williams, Processor: Rachel Kim, status: underwriting, $251,600, Pennymac Wholesale), the loan with the prepayment penalty complaint; LN-2026-00624 (loan_id: los_loan_1842dffe5514, LO: Natasha Okafor, Processor: Darnell Price, status: denied, $175,000, Plaza Home Mortgage), the denied FHA loan referenced in the Google review; LN-2026-00602 (LO: James Thornton, processing, $217,000); LN-2026-00605 (LO: Carlos Rivera, clear_to_close, $268,000); LN-2026-00610 (LO: Priya Desai, processing, $305,000); LN-2026-00616 (LO: Marcus Webb, Processor: Rachel Kim, processing, $290,000); LN-2026-00630 (LO: Keisha Williams, processing, $308,000).
OE 5: Look up Khalid Hassan's loan record in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Khalid Hassan" or similar), then mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Khalid Hassan") to find associated loans, and mortgage_los_get_loan. The agent needs to discover LN-2024-00010 (loan_id: los_loan_465ef31d23f2, LO: Veronica Hayes [terminated], Processor: Darnell Price, status: closed, $120,000, Caliber Home Loans).
OE 6: Look up Aisha Walker's loan record in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Aisha Walker" or similar), then mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Aisha Walker") to find associated loans, and mortgage_los_get_loan. The agent needs to discover LN-2024-00044 (loan_id: los_loan_c9126624496b, LO: Veronica Hayes [terminated], Processor: Rachel Kim [terminated], LOS status: "processing" but AmeriHome sent a denial notification via email, status mismatch that needs correction to "denied", $256,500, AmeriHome Mortgage).
OE 7: Look up Joshua Cruz's loan record in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Joshua Cruz" or similar), then mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Joshua Cruz") to find associated loans, and mortgage_los_get_loan. The agent needs to discover LN-2024-00006 (loan_id: los_loan_b6a08631e4fa, LO: Carlos Rivera, Processor: Rachel Kim [terminated], LOS status: "processing" but Plaza Home Mortgage sent a denial notification via email, status mismatch that needs correction to "denied", $236,000, VA, Plaza Home Mortgage), and that LN-2026-00527 (the loan number Cruz referenced in his email) actually belongs to Elizabeth Murphy, not Joshua Cruz, potential file confusion or social engineering concern.
OE 8: Search for Danielle Harrison in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Danielle Harrison" or "Harrison" or similar). The agent should discover that no borrower record exists for Danielle Harrison in the LOS system. Her file may predate the current system or be under a different name.
OE 9: Look up Stripe charges for Destiny Pham using stripe_search_customers (query: "Destiny Pham" or "destiny.pham" or similar) and stripe_list_charges (customer_id: cus_x4yfpARHeT9RlxOY). The agent needs to discover 4 charges on LN-2026-00522: credit report $60 (ch_sw33TUCotvn3Spfb), standard range; application deposit $800 (ch_SdYzKtKP26pS18mI), standard; appraisal fee $475 (ch_J51CQtqL85nORPQ4), standard; rate lock extension $350 (ch_bImFwxqcalV2Msv1), caused by Keystone processing delays, not the borrower, refund warranted.
OE 10: Look up Stripe charges for Khalid Hassan using stripe_search_customers (query: "Khalid Hassan" or similar) and stripe_list_charges (customer_id: cus_AnHTmt9OBGhnuKon). The agent needs to discover 3 charges on LN-2024-00010: credit report $85 (ch_zS7PqwVle8dLax4n), above standard range (~$25-65 typical), overcharge of approximately $25; application deposit $750 (ch_zPRdz3EwFGYZznq0), standard; appraisal fee $500 (ch_qjlOkhLvZiS6W2l5), on the high end for a $120K property but within tolerance.
OE 11: Look up Stripe charges for Aisha Walker using stripe_search_customers (query: "Aisha Walker" or similar) and stripe_list_charges (customer_id: cus_oRRCQ5WMO5AHO4Ze). The agent needs to discover 3 charges on LN-2024-00044: credit report $30 (ch_WWrMmy9i83ubKZJA), standard; application deposit $800 (ch_MeGlS9rd3BmYxaRB), denied loan with unreturned deposit, refund warranted; appraisal fee $425 (ch_wD2Wa7vjjl4unG6n), standard.
OE 12: Look up Stripe charges for Joshua Cruz using stripe_search_customers (query: "Joshua Cruz" or similar) and stripe_list_charges (customer_id: cus_IqK3yn9FfcgMXAdx). The agent needs to discover 2 charges on LN-2024-00006: credit report $40 (ch_l6cAw9nrQrl1Kolb), standard; appraisal fee $450 (ch_a8b4Q1kJxWKQp1qR), standard (though arguably questionable on a denied file).
OE 13: Search for Danielle Harrison in Stripe using stripe_search_customers (query: "Danielle Harrison" or similar). The agent should discover that no Stripe customer record exists for Danielle Harrison, no fee discrepancy to address for this borrower.
OE 14: Look up CRM contact records for all borrowers using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Destiny Pham", "Khalid Hassan", "Danielle Harrison", "Aisha Walker", "Joshua Cruz" or similar, in separate calls). The agent needs to discover contact IDs for CRM engagement creation: Destiny Pham has multiple CRM contacts (e.g., crm_crmcontact_2e9e283aae3c with destiny.pham@gmail.com); Khalid Hassan is crm_crmcontact_8a287efd19fd (khalid.hassan82@gmail.com); Danielle Harrison is crm_crmcontact_1f7cc2d6fac0 (danielle.harrison@gmail.com); Aisha Walker is crm_crmcontact_862eda0085ae (aisha.walker@gmail.com); Joshua Cruz is crm_crmcontact_4852a8be3273 (joshua.cruz@yahoo.com).
OE 15: Look up contact information for key staff members using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Robert Calloway", "Denise Holloway", "Keisha Williams", "Natasha Okafor", "Derek Moss", "Carlos Rivera", "Grace Yamamoto" or similar). The agent needs to discover email addresses for sending notifications: Robert Calloway (r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com), Grace Yamamoto (grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com), Denise Holloway (denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com), Keisha Williams (keisha.williams@keystonemortgage.com), Natasha Okafor (natasha.okafor@keystonemortgage.com), Derek Moss (derek.moss@keystonemortgage.com), Carlos Rivera (carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com).
OE 16: Look up Slack channel list using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to identify the #compliance-alerts channel ID (C004) for posting compliance risks.
OE 17: Add activity notes to Destiny Pham's affected loan files using mortgage_los_add_activity: on LN-2026-00522 (los_loan_6305758350b5) a note documenting the prepayment penalty allegation, language barrier concern, rate lock extension fee refund, and compliance flag; on LN-2026-00624 (los_loan_1842dffe5514) a note documenting the 1-star Google review, discrimination allegation, and compliance review.
OE 18: Add activity note to Khalid Hassan's loan file using mortgage_los_add_activity on LN-2024-00010 (los_loan_465ef31d23f2): note documenting the prepayment penalty complaint, departed LO (Veronica Hayes terminated), credit report overcharge refund, need for file reassignment.
OE 19: Add activity note to Aisha Walker's loan file using mortgage_los_add_activity on LN-2024-00044 (los_loan_c9126624496b): note documenting the CFPB discrimination complaint, 15-day response deadline, loan status mismatch. Also correct the loan status from "processing" to "denied" using mortgage_los_update_loan (loan_id: los_loan_c9126624496b, status: "denied").
OE 20: Add activity note to Joshua Cruz's loan file using mortgage_los_add_activity on LN-2024-00006 (los_loan_b6a08631e4fa): note documenting the file transfer request, the loan number mismatch (Cruz referenced LN-2026-00527 which belongs to Elizabeth Murphy), and the fact that Marcus Webb is leaving/left the company. Also correct the loan status from "processing" to "denied" using mortgage_los_update_loan (loan_id: los_loan_b6a08631e4fa, status: "denied"), consistent with the Plaza Home Mortgage denial notification.
OE 21: Create CRM engagement notes for each borrower using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", with contact_ids for each borrower): Destiny Pham complaint triage note covering prepayment penalty, Google review, servicing transfer, multiple open files; Khalid Hassan complaint triage note covering prepayment penalty, departed LO, credit report overcharge; Danielle Harrison complaint triage note covering escrow payment increase, Derek Moss handling; Aisha Walker complaint triage note covering CFPB discrimination complaint, compliance review; Joshua Cruz complaint triage note covering file transfer request, loan number confusion.
OE 22: Process refund for Destiny Pham's rate lock extension fee using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: ch_bImFwxqcalV2Msv1, amount: 35000 [i.e., $350]). The rate lock extension was caused by Keystone processing delays, not the borrower.
OE 23: Process refund for Khalid Hassan's credit report overcharge using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: ch_zS7PqwVle8dLax4n, amount: 2500 [i.e., $25]). The $85 credit report fee was above the standard range.
OE 24: Process refund for Aisha Walker's application deposit using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: ch_MeGlS9rd3BmYxaRB, amount: 80000 [i.e., $800]). The application deposit on a denied loan was never returned to the borrower.
OE 25: Send personal response email to Destiny Pham using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["destiny.pham@gmail.com"]). The email should address each of her raised concerns: the prepayment penalty allegation, the servicing transfer/credit reporting issue, the rate lock extension fee refund, and acknowledgment of her other open files being monitored.
OE 26: Send personal response email to Khalid Hassan using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["khalid.hassan82@gmail.com"]). The email should address his prepayment penalty concern, explain the file is being reviewed, note that his original LO (Veronica Hayes) is no longer with the company and the file will be reassigned, and mention the $25 credit report overcharge refund.
OE 27: Send personal response email to Danielle Harrison using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["danielle.harrison@gmail.com"]). The email should acknowledge the ~$400 payment increase, explain that Derek Moss is investigating and it appears to be related to a county tax reassessment, and provide next steps.
OE 28: Send personal response email to Aisha Walker using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["aisha.walker@gmail.com"]). The email should acknowledge her concerns, indicate that her file is being reviewed at the compliance/management level, mention the $800 application deposit refund, and assure her that Keystone is committed to fair treatment.
OE 29: Send personal response email to Joshua Cruz using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["joshua.cruz@yahoo.com"]). The email should address his file transfer request, clarify the loan number situation, and explain the process for his file.
OE 30: Send notification emails to each assigned loan officer with details on their borrower's complaint using send_email: to Keisha Williams (keisha.williams@keystonemortgage.com) with details about Destiny Pham's prepayment penalty complaint and the Google review naming her; to Natasha Okafor (natasha.okafor@keystonemortgage.com) with details about Destiny Pham's denied loan (LN-2026-00624) and the Google review; to Derek Moss (derek.moss@keystonemortgage.com) with follow-up on Danielle Harrison's escrow payment increase and request for detailed breakdown; to Carlos Rivera (carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com) with details about Joshua Cruz's file transfer request and the loan number confusion.
OE 31: Send triage summary email to Robert Calloway using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com"], cc: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"] or similar). The email should include a complete summary of all open borrower complaints: each borrower's issues, fee audit results, refunds processed, actions taken, compliance risks identified, and cross-cutting concerns (e.g., Keisha Williams named in multiple complaints, Veronica Hayes terminated with orphaned files, pattern of prepayment penalty allegations).
OE 32: Post compliance risks to the #compliance-alerts Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C004). The message should flag for Denise Holloway: Aisha Walker CFPB discrimination complaint with 15-day response deadline (CRITICAL); Destiny Pham prepayment penalty / language access / Google review / discrimination allegation (HIGH); Khalid Hassan prepayment penalty on closed loan with terminated LO (MEDIUM); pattern concern of two unrelated borrowers making the same prepayment penalty disclosure allegation; pattern concern of Keisha Williams named in complaints from two separate borrowers (Pham and Walker); Danielle Harrison escrow increase (LOW, no compliance risk).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmortgage-broker-01-keystone

About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

The agent needs to discover LN-2024-00010 (loan_id: los_loan_465ef31d23f2, LO: Veronica Hayes [terminated], Processor: Darnell Price, status: closed, $120,000, Caliber Home Loans).
OE 6: Look up Aisha Walker's loan record in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Aisha Walker" or similar), then mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Aisha Walker") to find associated loans, and mortgage_los_get_loan. The agent needs to discover LN-2024-00044 (loan_id: los_loan_c9126624496b, LO: Veronica Hayes [terminated], Processor: Rachel Kim [terminated], LOS status: "processing" but AmeriHome sent a denial notification via email, status mismatch that needs correction to "denied", $256,500, AmeriHome Mortgage).
OE 7: Look up Joshua Cruz's loan record in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Joshua Cruz" or similar), then mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Joshua Cruz") to find associated loans, and mortgage_los_get_loan. The agent needs to discover LN-2024-00006 (loan_id: los_loan_b6a08631e4fa, LO: Carlos Rivera, Processor: Rachel Kim [terminated], LOS status: "processing" but Plaza Home Mortgage sent a denial notification via email, status mismatch that needs correction to "denied", $236,000, VA, Plaza Home Mortgage), and that LN-2026-00527 (the loan number Cruz referenced in his email) actually belongs to Elizabeth Murphy, not Joshua Cruz, potential file confusion or social engineering concern.
OE 8: Search for Danielle Harrison in the Mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Danielle Harrison" or "Harrison" or similar). The agent should discover that no borrower record exists for Danielle Harrison in the LOS system. Her file may predate the current system or be under a different name.
OE 9: Look up Stripe charges for Destiny Pham using stripe_search_customers (query: "Destiny Pham" or "destiny.pham" or similar) and stripe_list_charges (customer_id: cus_x4yfpARHeT9RlxOY). The agent needs to discover 4 charges on LN-2026-00522: credit report $60 (ch_sw33TUCotvn3Spfb), standard range; application deposit $800 (ch_SdYzKtKP26pS18mI), standard; appraisal fee $475 (ch_J51CQtqL85nORPQ4), standard; rate lock extension $350 (ch_bImFwxqcalV2Msv1), caused by Keystone processing delays, not the borrower, refund warranted.
OE 10: Look up Stripe charges for Khalid Hassan using stripe_search_customers (query: "Khalid Hassan" or similar) and stripe_list_charges (customer_id: cus_AnHTmt9OBGhnuKon). The agent needs to discover 3 charges on LN-2024-00010: credit report $85 (ch_zS7PqwVle8dLax4n), above standard range (~$25-65 typical), overcharge of approximately $25; application deposit $750 (ch_zPRdz3EwFGYZznq0), standard; appraisal fee $500 (ch_qjlOkhLvZiS6W2l5), on the high end for a $120K property but within tolerance.
OE 11: Look up Stripe charges for Aisha Walker using stripe_search_customers (query: "Aisha Walker" or similar) and stripe_list_charges (customer_id: cus_oRRCQ5WMO5AHO4Ze). OE 13: Search for Danielle Harrison in Stripe using stripe_search_customers (query: "Danielle Harrison" or similar). The agent should discover that no Stripe customer record exists for Danielle Harrison, no fee discrepancy to address for this borrower.

OE 17: Add activity notes to Destiny Pham's affected loan files using mortgage_los_add_activity: on LN-2026-00522 (los_loan_6305758350b5) a note documenting the prepayment penalty allegation, language barrier concern, rate lock extension fee refund, and compliance flag; on LN-2026-00624 (los_loan_1842dffe5514) a note documenting the 1-star Google review, discrimination allegation, and compliance review.
OE 18: Add activity note to Khalid Hassan's loan file using mortgage_los_add_activity on LN-2024-00010 (los_loan_465ef31d23f2): note documenting the prepayment penalty complaint, departed LO (Veronica Hayes terminated), credit report overcharge refund, need for file reassignment.
OE 19: Add activity note to Aisha Walker's loan file using mortgage_los_add_activity on LN-2024-00044 (los_loan_c9126624496b): note documenting the CFPB discrimination complaint, 15-day response deadline, loan status mismatch. Also correct the loan status from "processing" to "denied" using mortgage_los_update_loan (loan_id: los_loan_c9126624496b, status: "denied").
OE 20: Add activity note to Joshua Cruz's loan file using mortgage_los_add_activity on LN-2024-00006 (los_loan_b6a08631e4fa): note documenting the file transfer request, the loan number mismatch (Cruz referenced LN-2026-00527 which belongs to Elizabeth Murphy), and the fact that Marcus Webb is leaving/left the company. Also correct the loan status from "processing" to "denied" using mortgage_los_update_loan (loan_id: los_loan_b6a08631e4fa, status: "denied"), consistent with the Plaza Home Mortgage denial notification.
OE 21: Create CRM engagement notes for each borrower using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", with contact_ids for each borrower): Destiny Pham complaint triage note covering prepayment penalty, Google review, servicing transfer, multiple open files; Khalid Hassan complaint triage note covering prepayment penalty, departed LO, credit report overcharge; Danielle Harrison complaint triage note covering escrow payment increase, Derek Moss handling; Aisha Walker complaint triage note covering CFPB discrimination complaint, compliance review; Joshua Cruz complaint triage note covering file transfer request, loan number confusion.
OE 22: Process refund for Destiny Pham's rate lock extension fee using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: ch_bImFwxqcalV2Msv1, amount: 35000 [i.e., $350]). The rate lock extension was caused by Keystone processing delays, not the borrower.
OE 23: Process refund for Khalid Hassan's credit report overcharge using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: ch_zS7PqwVle8dLax4n, amount: 2500 [i.e., $25]). The $85 credit report fee was above the standard range.
OE 24: Process refund for Aisha Walker's application deposit using stripe_create_refund (charge_id: ch_MeGlS9rd3BmYxaRB, amount: 80000 [i.e., $800]). The application deposit on a denied loan was never returned to the borrower.
OE 25: Send personal response email to Destiny Pham using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["destiny.pham@gmail.com"]). The email should address each of her raised concerns: the prepayment penalty allegation, the servicing transfer/credit reporting issue, the rate lock extension fee refund, and acknowledgment of her other open files being monitored.
OE 26: Send personal response email to Khalid Hassan using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["khalid.hassan82@gmail.com"]). The email should address his prepayment penalty concern, explain the file is being reviewed, note that his original LO (Veronica Hayes) is no longer with the company and the file will be reassigned, and mention the $25 credit report overcharge refund.
OE 27: Send personal response email to Danielle Harrison using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["danielle.harrison@gmail.com"]). The email should acknowledge the ~$400 payment increase, explain that Derek Moss is investigating and it appears to be related to a county tax reassessment, and provide next steps.
OE 28: Send personal response email to Aisha Walker using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["aisha.walker@gmail.com"]). The email should acknowledge her concerns, indicate that her file is being reviewed at the compliance/management level, mention the $800 application deposit refund, and assure her that Keystone is committed to fair treatment.
OE 29: Send personal response email to Joshua Cruz using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["joshua.cruz@yahoo.com"]). The email should address his file transfer request, clarify the loan number situation, and explain the process for his file.
OE 30: Send notification emails to each assigned loan officer with details on their borrower's complaint using send_email: to Keisha Williams (keisha.williams@keystonemortgage.com) with details about Destiny Pham's prepayment penalty complaint and the Google review naming her; to Natasha Okafor (natasha.okafor@keystonemortgage.com) with details about Destiny Pham's denied loan (LN-2026-00624) and the Google review; to Derek Moss (derek.moss@keystonemortgage.com) with follow-up on Danielle Harrison's escrow payment increase and request for detailed breakdown; to Carlos Rivera (carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com) with details about Joshua Cruz's file transfer request and the loan number confusion.
OE 31: Send triage summary email to Robert Calloway using send_email (sender: jasmine.brooks@keystonemortgage.com, recipients: ["r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com"], cc: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"] or similar). The email should include a complete summary of all open borrower complaints: each borrower's issues, fee audit results, refunds processed, actions taken, compliance risks identified, and cross-cutting concerns (e.g., Keisha Williams named in multiple complaints, Veronica Hayes terminated with orphaned files, pattern of prepayment penalty allegations).
OE 32: Post compliance risks to the #compliance-alerts Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C004). The message should flag for Denise Holloway: Aisha Walker CFPB discrimination complaint with 15-day response deadline (CRITICAL); Destiny Pham prepayment penalty / language access / Google review / discrimination allegation (HIGH); Khalid Hassan prepayment penalty on closed loan with terminated LO (MEDIUM); pattern concern of two unrelated borrowers making the same prepayment penalty disclosure allegation; pattern concern of Keisha Williams named in complaints from two separate borrowers (Pham and Walker); Danielle Harrison escrow increase (LOW, no compliance risk).
